name: agent-pack
description: AgentPack standard + AgentPack Registry — write once, install anywhere agents work.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @agentpack/core build && pnpm --filter @agentpack/db build && pnpm --filter @agentpack/connector build && pnpm --filter @agentpack/cli build && pnpm --filter @agentpack/registry build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @agentpack/core build && pnpm --filter @agentpack/db build && pnpm -r typecheck
scripts.verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm build
